constraints.layout_style: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input
Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only
Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root
At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element
Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form

reference_templates.title: Native select baseline
reference_templates.notes: Standard native select for work arrangement alongside text fields
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Native select

reference_templates.title: Tab panel hidden fields
reference_templates.notes: Fields in inactive tab panel hidden until tab clicked
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Tab panels

reference_templates.title: Aria-label only
reference_templates.notes: No visible labels; fields use aria-label exclusively
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Aria-label only

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Custom text field: div with role=textbox and contenteditable, no native input Required: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: At least two fields with aria-label only and no visible label element Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Reference DOM (Native select baseline): Standard native select for work arrangement alongside text fields Reference DOM (Tab panel hidden fields): Fields in inactive tab panel hidden until tab clicked Reference DOM (Aria-label only): No visible labels; fields use aria-label exclusively Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: div-role-textbox, table-layout, shadow-host, aria-label-only, decoy-form. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: fieldset stacks with legend-only section titles. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Native select baseline; Tab panel hidden fields; Aria-label only.
